title: ECC - Agent Harness 性能优化系统
summary: ECC 是一套完整的 AI Agent 工程系统，232+ 技能、60+ 专业 agent、基于信心的自动学习本能系统、内置安全审计。GitHub 185.9K 星。
summaryEn: ECC is a complete agent engineering system with 232+ skills, 60+ specialized agents, confidence-based automatic learning instincts, and built-in security auditing. 185.9K GitHub stars.

title: OpenMythos - Claude Mythos 架构开源重建
summary: OpenMythos 是对 Claude Mythos 架构的开源理论重建，实现 Recurrent-Depth Transformer（RDT），770M 参数达到 1.3B 标准 Transformer 效果。
summaryEn: OpenMythos is an open-source theoretical reconstruction of Claude Mythos, implementing Recurrent-Depth Transformer where 770M params match 1.3B transformer quality.

title: AI Agent 研究笔记
summary: AI Agent 领域研究笔记，记录技能系统、记忆架构、多 Agent 协作等研究方向。
summaryEn: Research notes on AI Agent domain covering skill systems, memory architecture, and multi-agent collaboration.

title: AI Agent 从零搭建
summary: 从工程角度搭建生产级别 AI Agent 的学习路线和笔记。
summaryEn: Learning path and notes for building production-grade AI Agents from an engineering perspective.

title: 排序算法可视化
summary: 看着数字「跳舞」，理解为什么有些排序方式天才，有些则低效。动画让算法活起来。
summaryEn: Watch numbers dance as you understand why some sorting methods are genius and others are inefficient.

title: 计算机颜色
summary: 探索计算机如何用数字描述世界上所有的颜色。从 RGB 到 HEX 到 HSL，每种格式都有它的故事。
summaryEn: Explore how computers describe every color in the world using numbers. From RGB to HEX to HSL, each format tells its own story.

title: 二进制的世界
summary: 一切都是 0 和 1——但这怎么可能代表文字、图片、音乐？揭开二进制的神秘面纱。
summaryEn: Everything is 0 and 1—but how can that possibly represent text, images, and music?

title: 手写 Promise
summary: 从发明者的角度理解 Promise，手写一个符合 Promises/A+ 规范的 Promise 类。
summaryEn: Understand Promise from the inventor's perspective and handwrite a Promise class that complies with the Promises/A+ specification.

title: SDD 规格驱动开发
summary: SDD 是 vibe coding 的进化版，先写规格再写代码，解决 AI 生成代码质量差、无法维护、验收标准不清的问题。
summaryEn: SDD is the evolution of vibe coding - write specs first, then code. Solves AI code quality, maintainability, and unclear acceptance criteria issues.

title: 傅里叶变换
summary: 任何复杂的波形都可以分解为简单正弦波的叠加——这个思想改变了整个工程世界。
summaryEn: Any complex waveform can be decomposed into a superposition of simple sine waves—this idea changed the entire engineering world.

title: Anthropic 创始人行动手册
titleEn: The Founder's Playbook: Building an AI-Native Startup
summary: Anthropic 发布的 AI 原生创业指南，36页 PDF，涵盖从 Idea 到 MVP 的完整框架。
summaryEn: Anthropic's guide for building an AI-native startup, 36-page PDF covering the complete framework from Idea to MVP.

title: Project EDEN
summary: Tripo AI 的 3D 世界模型研究计划，构建持久化、可复用、多人互动的 3D 环境。
summaryEn: Tripo AI's world model research initiative for persistent, reusable, multiplayer interactive 3D environments.

title: TanStack
summary: 现代 Web 应用基础设施库集合，框架无关（React/Svelte/Vue/Solid）。
summaryEn: Modern web application infrastructure library collection, framework-agnostic (React/Svelte/Vue/Solid).
